scenario: LangChain4j 向量 RAG、KnowledgeSearchSkill 与来源引用

checks.description: Controlled documents are split through LangChain4j and indexed as independent vectors with source metadata
knowledge_search exposes a JSON Tool contract and returns source-bearing evidence through ToolRouter
An LLM retrieval decision calls knowledge_search and its result is injected into the next ReAct observation
Answers with a real knowledge observation receive only the returned source and chunk identifier
Main ReAct and retrieval-decision prompts require Tool selection and reject invented citations
The local CLI embedded controlled documents with Qwen3-Embedding-4B and returned breathing-difficulty evidence with a real source marker
